## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.10

### 📷 Cameras
- Restores supported camera setup and tuning controls in Home Assistant when the X-Sense app reports that the feature and account support it.
- Keeps native Home Assistant WebRTC live view on the direct camera signaling path, with no video transcoding or external WebRTC integration required.
- Replays Home Assistant ICE candidates after a WebRTC offer retry so reconnecting cameras do not lose candidates before the answer arrives.
- Includes standalone camera device select controls, matching the existing camera, switch, and number entity handling.

### 🧪 Device Actions
- Removes the unconfirmed XS03-iWX mute action while keeping the cleanup targeted to that model only.
- Normalizes more self-test report payload shapes so successful test results update the Home Assistant self-test sensors.
- Updates self-test result sensors immediately after a successful Home Assistant test button action.

### 🛠 Diagnostics
- Adds safe debug logging around camera configuration writes, including endpoint and changed field names without full serials or raw payload values.
- Keeps camera controls support-gated and admin-gated so unsupported or read-only accounts do not get writable setup entities.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for camera control payloads, standalone camera select entities, self-test payload aliases, targeted obsolete action cleanup, and WebRTC ICE retry behavior.
